description: Change-request immediate receipt with a longer multi-line message

values.message: Could you change the hero image to the new one I uploaded last week? The current one is from before the rebrand.

expected.subject: Got it — change request received
expected.body:
Hi Jordan,

Got your change request:

  "Could you change the hero image to the new one I uploaded last week? The current one is from before the rebrand."

What happens next:
  • Straightforward edits (text, opening hours, services, your
    phone number, photos etc.) get applied automatically and
    your site usually updates within a few minutes.
  • Anything bigger or design-related I'll look at personally
    and reply on your dashboard.

I'll email you when it's done, or if I need anything from you
to finish it off. You can check status any time on your
dashboard.

— Ben
